name: 06 Manual Media Submit
description: Webhook ingress for manual media URLs: normalize the request, reuse 04_video_transcript_ingest only as the transcript adapter, then run the shared mainline 00 -> 01a -> 03 -> 02 -> 04a, write through the shared Vault writer, and finally run deferred 03b Qdrant commit before responding.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { accepted: true, stage: '06_manual_media_submit_dispatched', manual_submission_id: $json.manual_submission_id || null, request_url: $json.transcript_source_url, canonical_url: $json.canonical_url } }}
